checks.description: Guardrail: Q must never contain unknown (X) or high‑impedance (Z) values and must follow the Johnson counter transition rule across observed cycles.
checks.pass_condition: All recorded Q samples are fully defined (no X/Z) and each successive sample satisfies the Johnson rule: if previous LSB was 0 then next MSB is 1, otherwise next MSB is 0, with a right‑shift of the remaining bits.
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge_001 plan case records Q values across consecutive clock edges.

checks.pass_condition: After reset release, Q becomes a defined 64‑bit value (no X/Z) and shows observable progression on successive clock edges.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 plan case executes and records Q over a few clock cycles.
